response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong fullstack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq). Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Has worked with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python implied). Strong TDD/testing culture evident from talks, workshops, and Fluent-Asserts library. No explicit Nest.js mention, no explicit Vitest mention (though Jest-equivalent testing experience is clear). Kotlin not mentioned, only Java. PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned but MongoDB and MySQL/SQL are. Education claim of MIT BS during 2009-2012 while simultaneously working multiple jobs in Europe is suspicious but not disqualifying. Overall a very strong senior-level fullstack profile with the rare bonus of AI agent experience.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React matching primary stack
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work directly matches AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD culture: workshops, Fluent-Asserts library, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; only Java as JVM language
MIT degree timeline overlaps with European employment, raising verification questions
response.justification: Bogdan is a senior fullstack engineer whose current and prior roles align tightly with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and who already works on AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling — a rare and exact match for the AI agent requirement. Gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin are framework/language specifics that an engineer of this depth can pick up quickly, and his strong testing and architecture background mitigates the risk.
